subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Yield praise unto the peerless Lord that He hath confirmed thee in a Cause whereof most of the world’s women are deprived
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حمد کن خداوند یکتا را که ترا موید فرمود بر امریکه اکثر اماء ارض
subcodes.subjects: @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
